# Medusa

> Medusa is a digital commerce platform with a built-in Framework for customization. When you install Medusa, you get a fully fledged commerce platform with all the features you need to get off the ground. However, unlike other platforms, Medusa is built with customization in mind. You don't need to build hacky workarounds that are difficult to maintain and scale. Your efforts go into building features that bring your business's vision to life.

Medusa ships with three main tools:

- A suite of Commerce Modules with core commerce functionalities, such as tracking inventory, calculating cart totals, accepting payments, managing orders, and much more.
- A framework for building custom functionalities specific to your business, product, or industry. This includes tools for introducing custom API endpoints, business logic, and data models; building workflows and automations; and integrating with third-party services.
- A customizable admin dashboard for merchants to configure and operate their store.

Medusa is for businesses and teams looking for a digital commerce platform with the tools to implement unique requirements that other platforms aren't built to support.

Businesses of all sizes can use Medusa, from small start ups to large enterprises. Also, technical teams of all sizes can build with Medusa; all it takes is a developer to manage and deploy Medusa projects.

## Get Started

- [Get Started](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/installation): Install a digital commerce application with Medusa.
- [Install with Docker](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/installation/docker): Install Medusa with Docker.
- [Main docs](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn): Chapters to learn Medusa's concepts and toolings.
- [Medusa Architecture](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/introduction/architecture): Overview of Medusa's architecture.
- [Build with AI Assistants and LLMs](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/introduction/build-with-llms-ai): Use AI assistants and LLMs to build with Medusa.
- [From Medusa v1 to v2](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/introduction/from-v1-to-v2): Conceptual differences between Medusa v1 and v2.
- [Update Medusa](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/update): Update Medusa to the latest version.
- [Build Medusa Application](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/build): Build and compile the Medusa application.

## Product

### Framework

- [Framework Overview](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/framework): Overview of Medusa's Framework and concepts in it like API routes, modules, data models, etc...
- [API Routes](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/api-routes): Create custom API endpoints.
- [API Route Parameters](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/api-routes/parameters): Use path and query parameters in API routes.
- [HTTP Methods](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/api-routes/http-methods): Supported HTTP methods for API routes.
- [API Route Response](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/api-routes/responses): Return responses from API routes.
- [Request Body and Query Parameter Validation](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/api-routes/validation): Validate request body and query parameters.
- [Middlewares](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/api-routes/middlewares): Create and apply middlewares to API routes.
- [Protected API Routes](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/api-routes/protected-routes): Protect API routes with authentication.
- [Handling CORS in API Routes](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/api-routes/cors): Configure CORS for API routes.
- [Pass Additional Data to Medusa](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/api-routes/additional-data): Pass extra data to core API routes.
- [Throwing and Handling Errors](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/api-routes/errors): Throw and handle errors in API routes.
- [Override API Routes](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/api-routes/override): Override existing Medusa API routes.
- [Configure Request Body Parser](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/api-routes/parse-body): Configure the body parser for API routes.
- [Localization in API Routes](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/api-routes/localization): Add localization support to API routes.
- [Retrieve Custom Links from Medusa](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/api-routes/retrieve-custom-links): Retrieve custom module link data in API routes.
- [Data Models](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/data-models): Define and manage data models.
- [Data Model Properties](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/data-models/properties): Define properties on data models.
- [Data Model Relationships](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/data-models/relationships): Define relationships between data models.
- [Manage Relationships](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/data-models/manage-relationships): Create, update, and delete relationship records.
- [JSON Properties in Data Models](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/data-models/json-properties): Use JSON properties in data models.
- [Data Model Database Index](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/data-models/indexes): Add database indexes to data models.
- [Add Data Model Check Constraints](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/data-models/check-constraints): Add check constraints to data model properties.
- [Infer Type of Data Model](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/data-models/infer-type): Infer TypeScript type from a data model.
- [Migrations](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/data-models/write-migration): Write and run database migrations.
- [Events and Subscribers](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/events-and-subscribers): Handle events and create subscribers.
- [Event Data Payload](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/events-and-subscribers/data-payload): Access event data in subscribers.
- [Emit Workflow and Service Events](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/events-and-subscribers/emit-event): Emit custom events from workflows and services.
- [Event Processing Priority](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/events-and-subscribers/event-priority): Set the processing priority of events.
- [Index Module](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/module-links/index-module): Use the Index Module for module links.
- [Medusa Container](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/medusa-container): Access registered resources in Medusa.
- [Modules](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/modules): Build reusable commerce functionalities.
- [Modules Directory Structure](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/modules/modules-directory-structure): Understand the module directory structure.
- [Module Container](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/modules/container): Access the module container in a service.
- [Module Isolation](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/modules/isolation): Understand module isolation in Medusa.
- [Module Options](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/modules/options): Pass options to a custom module.
- [Loaders](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/modules/loaders): Run custom logic when a module is loaded.
- [Multiple Services in a Module](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/modules/multiple-services): Create multiple services in a module.
- [Service Constraints](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/modules/service-constraints): Understand constraints when building module services.
- [Service Factory](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/modules/service-factory): Use the service factory for data management.
- [Perform Database Operations in a Service](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/modules/db-operations): Run database operations in a module service.
- [Commerce Modules in Custom Modules](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/modules/commerce-modules): Use commerce modules within custom modules.
- [Infrastructure Modules in Custom Modules](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/modules/infrastructure-modules): Use infrastructure modules within custom modules.
- [Module Links](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/module-links): Link data models across modules.
- [Link](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/module-links/link): Create a link between two module records.
- [Query](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/module-links/query): Query linked data models.
- [Module Link Direction](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/module-links/directions): Understand the direction of module links.
- [Add Columns to a Link Table](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/module-links/custom-columns): Add extra columns to a module link table.
- [Query Context](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/module-links/query-context): Use query context when querying linked data.
- [Read-Only Module Link](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/module-links/read-only): Create a read-only link between modules.
- [Plugins](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/plugins): Extend Medusa with plugins.
- [Create a Plugin](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/plugins/create): Create and publish a Medusa plugin.
- [Scheduled Jobs](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/scheduled-jobs): Create and manage scheduled jobs.
- [Set Interval for Scheduled Jobs](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/scheduled-jobs/interval): Configure the interval of a scheduled job.
- [Scheduled Job Number of Executions](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/scheduled-jobs/execution-number): Limit how many times a scheduled job runs.
- [Workflows](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/workflows): Build workflows and automations.
- [Compensation Function](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/workflows/compensation-function): Roll back workflow steps with compensation functions.
- [Workflow Hooks](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/workflows/workflow-hooks): Inject logic into a workflow with hooks.
- [Expose a Workflow Hook](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/workflows/add-workflow-hook): Add a hook to a custom workflow.
- [Conditions in Workflows with When-Then](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/workflows/conditions): Use when-then to add conditions to workflows.
- [Run Workflow Steps in Parallel](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/workflows/parallel-steps): Execute multiple steps simultaneously.
- [Execute Nested Workflows](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/workflows/execute-another-workflow): Call one workflow from within another.
- [Error Handling in Workflows](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/workflows/errors): Handle and recover from errors in workflows.
- [Locking Operations in Workflows](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/workflows/locks): Use locks to prevent concurrent workflow execution.
- [Long-Running Workflows](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/workflows/long-running-workflow): Build workflows that run over extended periods.
- [Retry Failed Steps](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/workflows/retry-failed-steps): Configure automatic retry for failed workflow steps.
- [Multiple Step Usage in Workflows](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/workflows/multiple-step-usage): Reuse the same step multiple times in a workflow.
- [Data Manipulation in Workflows with transform](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/workflows/variable-manipulation): Use transform to manipulate data between steps.
- [Workflow Timeout](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/workflows/workflow-timeout): Set a timeout for workflow execution.
- [Workflow Constraints](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/workflows/constructor-constraints): Understand constraints when building workflows.
- [Store Workflow Executions](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/workflows/store-executions): Persist workflow execution history.
- [Custom CLI Scripts](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/custom-cli-scripts): Create custom scripts to run via the CLI.
- [Seed Data with Custom CLI Script](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/custom-cli-scripts/seed-data): Seed your database using a custom CLI script.
- [Environment Variables](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/environment-variables): Manage environment variables in Medusa.
- [Automatically Generated Types](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/generated-types): Use auto-generated TypeScript types in your project.

### Admin Development

- [Admin Development](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/admin): Build custom widgets and routes for the admin dashboard.
- [Admin Widgets](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/admin/widgets): Create custom widgets for the admin dashboard.
- [Admin UI Routes](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/admin/ui-routes): Create custom UI routes in the admin dashboard.
- [Admin Routing Customizations](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/admin/routing): Understand routing in admin customizations.
- [Environment Variables in Admin Customizations](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/admin/environment-variables): Use environment variables in admin customizations.
- [Admin Development Constraints](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/admin/constraints): Understand constraints in admin development.
- [Admin Development Tips](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/admin/tips): Tips and best practices for admin development.
- [Translate Admin Customizations](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/fundamentals/admin/translations): Add translations to custom admin components.

### Customization Tutorial

- [Build Custom Features](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/customization/custom-features): Step-by-step guide to building custom features.
- [Guide: Implement Brand Module](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/customization/custom-features/module): Create a custom module in the tutorial.
- [Guide: Create Brand Workflow](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/customization/custom-features/workflow): Create a workflow in the tutorial.
- [Guide: Create Brand API Route](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/customization/custom-features/api-route): Expose an API route in the tutorial.
- [Extend Core Commerce Features](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/customization/extend-features): Extend Medusa's built-in commerce features.
- [Guide: Define Module Link Between Brand and Product](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/customization/extend-features/define-link): Link a custom module to a core module.
- [Guide: Extend Create Product Flow](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/customization/extend-features/extend-create-product): Add custom logic to the create product workflow.
- [Guide: Query Linked Records](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/customization/extend-features/query-linked-records): Retrieve linked data across modules.
- [Customize Medusa Admin Dashboard](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/customization/customize-admin): Add custom UI to the Medusa admin dashboard.
- [Create Brands UI Route in Admin](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/customization/customize-admin/route): Create a custom admin route in the tutorial.
- [Guide: Add Product Widget](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/customization/customize-admin/widget): Add a widget to the product page in admin.
- [Integrate Third-Party Systems](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/customization/integrate-systems): Connect external services with Medusa.
- [Guide: Integrate Third-Party Brand System](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/customization/integrate-systems/service): Build a service to integrate with a third-party API.
- [Guide: Sync Brands from Medusa to Third-Party](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/customization/integrate-systems/handle-event): Sync data on events.
- [Guide: Schedule Syncing Brands from Third-Party](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/customization/integrate-systems/schedule-task): Schedule periodic sync with a third-party.
- [Re-Use Customizations with Plugins](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/customization/reuse-customizations): Package customizations as a reusable plugin.
- [Customizations Next Steps](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/customization/next-steps): Continue learning after the customization tutorial.

### Modules

- [Commerce Modules](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/commerce-modules): List of all Commerce Modules in Medusa and an entry point to their documentation.
- [Infrastructure Modules](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/infrastructure-modules): List of all Infrastructure Modules in Medusa and an entry point to their documentation.

### Debugging and Testing

- [Medusa Testing Tools](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/debugging-and-testing/testing-tools): Overview of testing tools available in Medusa.
- [Write Integration Tests](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/debugging-and-testing/testing-tools/integration-tests): Set up and write integration tests.
- [Example: Write Integration Tests for API Routes](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/debugging-and-testing/testing-tools/integration-tests/api-routes): Integration test examples for API routes.
- [Example: Write Integration Tests for Workflows](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/debugging-and-testing/testing-tools/integration-tests/workflows): Integration test examples for workflows.
- [Write Tests for Modules](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/debugging-and-testing/testing-tools/modules-tests): Write unit tests for custom modules.
- [Debug Workflows](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/debugging-and-testing/debug-workflows): Debug workflow executions.
- [Logging](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/debugging-and-testing/logging): Configure logging in Medusa.
- [Override Logger](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/debugging-and-testing/logging/custom-logger): Replace the default logger with a custom one.
- [Configure Instrumentation](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/debugging-and-testing/instrumentation): Set up OpenTelemetry instrumentation.
- [Feature Flags](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/debugging-and-testing/feature-flags): Enable and disable feature flags.
- [Create Custom Feature Flag](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/debugging-and-testing/feature-flags/create): Define a custom feature flag.

### Deployment and Configuration

- [Medusa Deployment Overview](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/deployment): Overview of deploying Medusa to production.
- [General Medusa Application Deployment Guide](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/deployment/general): Step-by-step guide for deploying Medusa.
- [Worker Mode of Medusa Instance](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/production/worker-mode): Run Medusa in worker mode for background jobs.
- [Medusa Application Configuration](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/configurations/medusa-config): Configure the Medusa application with medusa-config.
- [Asymmetric Encryption](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/configurations/medusa-config/asymmetric-encryption): Configure asymmetric encryption in Medusa.
- [Use pnpm with Medusa](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/configurations/pnpm): Use pnpm as your package manager with Medusa.
- [Using TypeScript Aliases](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/configurations/ts-aliases): Configure TypeScript path aliases in Medusa.

### Storefront Development

- [Storefront Development](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/storefront-development): Overview of building storefronts with Medusa.

### Best Practices

- [Best Practices for Third-Party Syncing](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/best-practices/third-party-sync): Best practices when syncing data with third-party services.

### Codemods

- [Medusa Codemods](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/codemods): Automated code migration tools for Medusa upgrades.
- [Replace Imports Codemod](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/codemods/replace-imports): Automatically replace deprecated imports.
- [Replace Zod Imports Codemod](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/codemods/replace-zod-imports): Automatically replace Zod imports.

### Contributing

- [Docs Contribution Guidelines](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/resources/contribution-guidelines/docs): How to contribute to Medusa documentation.
- [Translate Medusa Admin](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/resources/contribution-guidelines/admin-translations): Contribute translations for the Medusa admin.
- [Usage Information](https://docs.medusajs.com/learn/resources/usage): Information about Medusa usage data collection.

## Commerce Modules

### Cart & Purchase

- [Cart](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/commerce-modules/cart): Add to cart, checkout, and totals.
- [Payment](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/commerce-modules/payment): Process any payment type.
- [Customer](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/commerce-modules/customer): Customer and group management.

### Merchandising

- [Pricing](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/commerce-modules/pricing): Configurable pricing engine.
- [Promotion](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/commerce-modules/promotion): Discounts and promotions.
- [Product](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/commerce-modules/product): Variants, categories, and bulk edits.

### Fulfillment

- [Order](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/commerce-modules/order): Omnichannel order management.
- [Inventory](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/commerce-modules/inventory): Multi-warehouse and reservations.
- [Fulfillment](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/commerce-modules/fulfillment): Order fulfillment and shipping.
- [Stock Location](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/commerce-modules/stock-location): Locations of stock-kept items.

### Regions & Channels

- [Region](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/commerce-modules/region): Cross-border commerce.
- [Sales Channel](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/commerce-modules/sales-channel): Omnichannel sales.
- [Tax](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/commerce-modules/tax): Granular tax control.
- [Currency](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/commerce-modules/currency): Multi-currency support.

### User Access

- [API Keys](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/commerce-modules/api-key): Store and admin access.
- [User Module](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/commerce-modules/user): Admin user management.
- [Auth](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/commerce-modules/auth): Integrate authentication methods.

## Infrastructure Modules

- [Analytics](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/infrastructure-modules/analytics): Track and analyze user interactions and system events with third-party services.
- [Caching](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/infrastructure-modules/caching): Cache data in your Medusa application, improving performance and reducing latency for frequently accessed data.
- [Event](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/infrastructure-modules/event): Handles queueing events, emitting them, and executing their subscribers.
- [File](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/infrastructure-modules/file): Store assets, such as product images, in third-party providers.
- [Locking](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/infrastructure-modules/locking): Manages access to shared resources by multiple processes or threads.
- [Notification](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/infrastructure-modules/notification): Send a notification to customers or users, such as order confirmation emails.
- [Workflow Engine](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/infrastructure-modules/workflow-engine): Handles tracking and recording the transactions and statuses of workflows and their steps.

## Build

- [Recipes](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/recipes): Build common use cases with step-by-step guides.
- [How-to & Tutorials](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/how-to-tutorials): How-to guides and tutorials for building with Medusa.
- [Integrations](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/integrations): Integrate third-party services with Medusa.
- [Storefront](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/storefront-development): Build storefronts with Medusa.

## Tools

### CLI Tools

- [create-medusa-app](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/create-medusa-app): CLI tool to create Medusa applications.
- [Medusa CLI](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/medusa-cli): CLI tool for managing Medusa projects.

### Development Tools

- [JS SDK](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/js-sdk): JavaScript SDK for interacting with Medusa.
- [Next.js Starter](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/nextjs-starter): Next.js storefront starter template and how to install it.
- [Medusa UI](https://docs.medusajs.com/ui): A React library to build applications using Medusa's primitives and design system.

## References

### API References

- [Admin API Reference](https://docs.medusajs.com/api/admin): List of all Admin API routes in Medusa with code snippets.
- [Store API Reference](https://docs.medusajs.com/api/store): List of all Store API Routes in Medusa with code snippets.

### Development References

- [Admin Injection Zones](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/admin-widget-injection-zones): Injection zones for customizing the admin dashboard.
- [Container Resources](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/medusa-container-resources): Resources available in the Medusa Container.
- [Core Workflows](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/medusa-workflows-reference): Reference for core workflows in Medusa.
- [Data Model Language](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/references/data-model): Reference for the Data Model Language.
- [Data Model Repository](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/data-model-repository-reference): Reference for the Data Model Repository.
- [Events Reference](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/references/events): Reference for events in Medusa.
- [Helper Steps](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/references/helper-steps): Reference for helper steps in workflows.
- [Service Factory](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/service-factory-reference): Reference for the Service Factory.
- [Testing Framework](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/test-tools-reference): Reference for testing tools in Medusa.
- [Workflows SDK](https://docs.medusajs.com/resources/references/workflows): Reference for the Workflows SDK.

## Medusa Admin

- [User Guide](https://docs.medusajs.com/user-guide): Guide for merchants and users to manage their Medusa store with the Medusa Admin.

## Cloud

- [Medusa Cloud](https://docs.medusajs.com/cloud): Deploy and manage Medusa projects on Medusa Cloud.
